task_completion.description: Navigate to the Complaints module in ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ArkCase web interface with the 'Complaints' module open and a list of caseloads/supervisees visible.

task_completion.description: Change the Priority to 'High' for the non-compliant cases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the case details for Williams, Gutierrez, or Reed showing the 'Priority' field successfully changed to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Add the specific non-compliance case note to the non-compliant cases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Notes section of Williams, Gutierrez, or Reed with the exact text: 'NON-COMPLIANCE FLAGGED: Supervisee has failed to appear for mandatory monthly contact. Case escalated per Policy CPO-7.3b. Supervisor notification required.'

task_completion.description: Create a task titled 'Schedule immediate office report' assigned to the admin for the non-compliant cases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Tasks section of Williams, Gutierrez, or Reed with a new task titled 'Schedule immediate office report' and the assignee set to 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com'.

task_completion.description: Do not modify compliant cases (Last Contact on or after December 1, 2025).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show that cases for Osei, Nair, Foster, or Belobrov were either not opened, or if visible, show no changes to Priority, no new notes, and no new tasks.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ArkCase graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ArkCase UI, clicking buttons, and filling forms, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent typed or pasted the required text into the actual ArkCase application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required note text and task titles appear inside the appropriate input boxes or saved records within the ArkCase web interface, not just in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots shows standard user navigation (opening cases, clicking 'Add Note', 'Add Task', saving) rather than sudden, unexplained state changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There are exactly 3 non-compliant cases (Last Contact before 2025-12-01): Williams (2025-09-14), Gutierrez (2025-10-02), and Reed (2025-08-30). These 3 cases must have their Priority changed to 'High', receive the specific case note ('NON-COMPLIANCE FLAGGED: Supervisee has failed to appear for mandatory monthly contact. Case escalated per Policy CPO-7.3b. Supervisor notification required.'), and have a task created ('Schedule immediate office report' assigned to arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com). There are 4 compliant cases (Osei, Nair, Foster, Belobrov) that must NOT be modified.
